release_notes: **OTM % selector picking ITM strikes for put legs**: `otm_pct` computed the strike the same way for both option types, so a positive percent moved the strike above spot regardless of CE/PE — correct for a call, but in-the-money for a put. It's now option-type aware: positive percent always moves the strike out-of-the-money (above for a call, below for a put); negative moves it ITM. Existing saved strategies (including the live weekly strangle) and Composer templates were migrated to the new sign convention with no change in the strikes they actually pick.
